name: Ryoyo Electro Corporation
summary: Ryoyo Electro Corporation, an electronics trading company, distributes semiconductors, ICT products, and embedded devices in Japan and rest of Asia. The company offers analog and power, logic, and memory semiconductors. It also provides PC/Server/Network, I/O equipment, and software products, as well as engineering support and other services. The company was formerly as Ryoyo Electronics Corporation and changed its name to Ryoyo Electro Corporation in 1985. Ryoyo Electro Corporation was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
